title: pelargonium × longipetalum
intro: Pelargonium × longipetalum, also known as Geranium essential oil or long-flowered geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the family Geraniaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × longipetalum include relief from anxiety, stress, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in essential oil form, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
